name: SHINJI HENKOU NO JUTSU (MIND ALTERATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H

This technique attempts to fundamentally alter the thought patterns of a target, and is generally only used when drastic measures are required. The technique cannot be used more than once per day on the same creature. The subject will suffer one of the following effects:

Instill Fear - The subject experiences uncontrollable fear similar to a strong phobia, for 1 week per level. Whenever it is within 50 ft of a creature of your choice (you may choose yourself) and is aware of them, the subject becomes shaken and suffers a -2 penalty to saves against fear effects coming from the chosen creature. A subject can only fear one creature at a Time: a second use of this technique will simply remove the existing fear and create a new one.

Modify Memory - You permanently alter the subject's memories by eliminating all memory of a single event, allowing it to recall an event from memory with perfect clarity, change he details of an event it remembers or implant a memory of an event it never experienced. You can modify up to 1 minute worth of memories per level, and can only change or remove memories which you know the subject has. Badly implanted or changed memories will be dismissed as a dream or similar.

Restore Memory - As Modify Memory, but you can restore any memories you know have been erased from the subject's mind. You are still restricted to 1 minute per level worth of memories. The perform DC changes to 25 + the level or HD of the source that caused the memory loss (minimum 39).

Modifying or Restoring Memory will require you to concentrate for the length of the memory in question.

You can dispel this technique as a full-round action as long as you are within 1 mile of the subject. If you dispel a modified memory, you dispel only a single instance of this technique of your choice.

system.target: One helpless or willing living creatures

target.value: One helpless or willing living creatures
